kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Exactly two of Wulfric, the artisan with 13 coins, the artisan with 14 coins, and the artisan with 15 coins belong to the South Side.
The artisan in Kingsford's levy is lower than both Edmund and the Cooper.
If at least one of Eastcheap goes with Wulfric, 14 coins does not go with Godfrey, or Mason goes with Godfrey, then 12 coins does not go with Carpenter.
Exactly one of (the members of the Hill Ward and the Tanner) goes with (16 coins or 14 coins).
At least one of (the members of the North Side and Aldric) goes with (14 coins or 11 coins).
The Carpenter's levy is between the artisan in Highrow and Godfrey.
Between Eastcheap and Highrow, one goes with Potter and the other with Tanner.
Either 12 coins goes with Aldric or someone in the Clothiers' Guild goes with Aldric (but not both).
Cooper goes with exactly two of Beatrix, Millpond, and 15 coins.
Either Edmund goes with Mason or someone in the South Side goes with Edmund (but not both).
Either Fletcher goes with 15 coins, or Tanner goes with 14 coins — but not both.
Southgate goes with exactly two of Rowan, Carpenter, and 16 coins.
No members of the Clothiers' Guild are in the Gate Ward.
Wulfric goes with at least one of Tanner, 11 coins, or 13 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Beatrix goes with 16 coins; Rowan goes with Tanner; Carpenter goes with 15 coins.
If at least one of Kingsford goes with Rowan, Rowan goes with Mason, or Aldric does not belong to the North Side, then the Tanner belongs to the South Side.
